zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY於1219年出生在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希時，他的父親Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency46歲，母親Emma de Laval Dame de Laval22歲。他於1257年與Thomasse de la Guerche結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1267年1月在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY于1219年出生在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦蒙特莫倫希时，他的父亲Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency46岁，母亲Emma de Laval Dame de Laval22岁。他于1257年与Thomasse de la Guerche结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1267年1月在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥延賴伐爾享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Laval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Old French val (originally feminine, later masculine; see Val , compare Lavallee ), or a habitational name from Laval, the name of several places in various parts of France, ultimately derived from Latin vallis ‘valley’.

variants.name: Val
meanings: Spanish: variant of Valle , from val, a variant of valle ‘valley’. Compare Delval .
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, val (compare 3 below). Compare also Doval .

French and Haitian: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, (Old) French val (originally feminine, later masculine; compare Vallee ), from Latin vallis (feminine). Compare Duval and Laval .

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Victor
meanings: From a Late Latin personal name meaning ‘conqueror’. This was popular among early Christians as a reference to Christ's victory over death and sin, and was borne by several saints. An influence on the choice of the name in more recent times was the American actor  Victor Mature  (  1915–99 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY was born in 1219, in Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France, his father, Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency, was 46 and his mother, Emma de Laval Dame de Laval, was 22. He married Thomasse de la Guerche in 1257. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in January 1267, in Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 48.

Il a épousé Thomasse de la Guerche en 1257. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en janvier 1267, à Laval, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 48 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY(이)가 1219년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 몽모렌시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Laval Dame de Laval(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1257년 Thomasse de la Guerche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1267년 1월 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 메이니 라발에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY nasceu em 1219, em Montmorency, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França, seu pai, Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Laval Dame de Laval, tinha 22 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy VII de Montmorency Laval baron de Vitré de MONTMORENCY родился в 1219 г. в местности монтморенси, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Laval Dame de Laval, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasse de la Guerche в 1257 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер январь 1267 г. в местности лаваль, меиенн, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 48 лет.
